[Home](./index.md) &gt; [sh-ast](./sh-ast.md) &gt; [ShParseErrorInfo](./sh-ast.shparseerrorinfo.md) &gt; [column](./sh-ast.shparseerrorinfo.column.md)

## ShParseErrorInfo.column property

1-based column number, in \*\*UTF-16 code units\*\* — converted from mvdan/sh's own byte-counting column so it agrees with [ShNode.loc](./sh-ast.shnode.loc.md)<!-- -->'s columns (mvdan/sh reports `column` as a byte count on the source line, not a UTF-16 code unit count; see design/ARCHITECTURE.md's "Byte→UTF-16 conversion"). For ASCII-only source text this is numerically identical to mvdan/sh's own column.

**Signature:**

```typescript
column: number;
```
